productDisplayName: Lotto Men T-Effect IV White Sports Shoe
description: Designed for the runners who never compromise on style and comfort, T-Effect IV running shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces. Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforations on the forefoot and a mesh collar for enhanced breathablity Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort and snug fit Cushioned footbed for shock absorption Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves along the periphery, and square and round lugs throughout the foot length for absolute grip and traction Punto Flex groove on the forefoot for easy movement Scooped midfoot for enhanced cushioning shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
